brand_identity.name: Global Hire Assist
brand_identity.mission: Connecting talent with opportunity through trusted visa and recruitment services.
brand_identity.emotional_archetype: The Authority (Swiss & High-Contrast) + The Luxury (Jewel Accents)

headings.usage: All section headings (H1-H3). Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for H1.

body.usage: Paragraphs, navigation, buttons, and form labels.

primary.description: Navy Blue - Use for primary actions, header backgrounds, and footer.

secondary.description: Gold - Use sparingly for CTAs, success states, and accent borders.

surfaces.card: bg-white border border-border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 hover:border-secondary/50
surfaces.glass_header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/20 sticky top-0 z-50

buttons.primary: bg-secondary text-[#0B3D91] hover:bg-secondary/90 font-semibold rounded-md px-8 py-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-gold/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-white text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-md px-8 py-6 font-semibold
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-md px-6 py-4

cards.program_card: p-8 rounded-lg bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_4px_20px_-12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300
cards.testimonial_card: p-8 rounded-xl bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-secondary italic font-serif

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-md border-slate-200 focus:border-secondary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-secondary/50 bg-white

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or side image

interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards must have a lift effect (-translate-y-1) and shadow increase on hover.
interactions.page_transitions: Use simple opacity fade-in (0.3s ease-out) for all pages.
interactions.scroll_effects: Sticky header must blur background. Reveal elements on scroll using Intersection Observer (slide-up fade).

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Alt text mandatory for all images.
Focus rings must be visible (use ring-offset-2 ring-secondary).
Semantic HTML (main, section, nav, footer) is mandatory.
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts for everything. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Theme: Prefer Light Mode for trust, but support Dark Mode for accessibility.
No transparent backgrounds on surfaces with content underneath.
